provider: The Education University of Hong Kong 2026/27 Undergraduate Programme Course List

supplements.evidenceNote: The official 2026/27 course-list PDF publishes 24 unique course codes and titles, including the alternative Component II and Component III Cross-Faculty Core choices. It does not publish per-course credit points, a recommended year/semester pattern, or coded Final Year Project, Living and Working in Our Country, Minor/Elective, General Education or Language Enhancement lists. The programme page publishes only domain-level credit totals, so those totals are not assigned to individual courses and the uncoded domains are not invented here.
